stemHtml: After following a Resolution Advisory (RA) manoeuvre, the pilot should...

options.a: notify the ATC to check if the aircraft needs to return to its initial clearance.
options.b: delay ATC notification because Controller-Pilot Data Link Communications (CPDLC) provide information in real time.
options.c: notify ATC because only the pilot knows when ACAS issues RAs.
options.d: have ATC testify about the serious incident for legal reasons.
